section_title: Short title, extent and commencement.-(1) This Act may be called the Arbitration Act,
content:
1. Short title, extent and commencement.-(1) This Act may be called the Arbitration Act,
2001.
(2) It extends to the whole of Bangladesh.
(3) It shall come into force on such date as the Government shall, by notification in
the official Gazzette, appoint.
CHAPTER II
General Provisions

sub_sections.text:
This Act may be called the Arbitration Act,
2001.
It extends to the whole of Bangladesh.

It shall come into force on such date as the Government shall, by notification in
the official Gazzette, appoint.
CHAPTER II
General Provisions
